'''vopafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:veganlike|veganlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veganlike|veganlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vopafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || vopafithi || vopafiji || vopafishi || vopafiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || vopafuthu || vopafuju || vopafushu || vopafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || vopafuthu || vopafuju || vopafushu || vopafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || vopafufthuf || vopafufjuf || vopafufshuf || vopafufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || vopafethe || vopafeje || vopafeshe || vopafeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || vopafotho || vopafojo || vopafosho || vopafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || vopafotho || vopafojo || vopafosho || vopafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || vopafofthof || vopafofjof || vopafofshof || vopafofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vopafïfthïf || vopafïfjïf || vopafïfshïf || vopafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vopafïfthïf || vopafïfjïf || vopafïfshïf || vopafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vopafïfthïf || vopafïfjïf || vopafïfshïf || vopafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vopafïfthïf || vopafïfjïf || vopafïfshïf || vopafïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || vopafæthæ || vopafæjæ || vopafæshæ || vopafækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || vopafatha || vopafaja || vopafasha || vopafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || vopafatha || vopafaja || vopafasha || vopafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || vopafafthaf || vopafafjaf || vopafafshaf || vopafafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || vopafasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || vopafshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || vopafroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || vopafmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || vopafyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govopafnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govopafnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govopafnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govopafnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || vopapafasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || vopapafshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || vopapafroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || vopapafmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || vopapafyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govopapafnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govopapafnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govopapafnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govopapafnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || vepæfasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || vepæfshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || vepæfroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || vepæfmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || vepæfyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govepæfnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govepæfnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govepæfnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govepæfnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || vopfafasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || vopfafshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || vopfafroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || vopfafmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || vopfafyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govopfafnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govopfafnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govopfafnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govopfafnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
